abilities.name: Hard to Wound +2
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer --.

abilities.name: Terrifying (Living) (12)
abilities.description: Enemy Living characters must pass TN 12 Horror Duel when ending turn in engagement range or targeting.

abilities.name: Walking Morgue
abilities.description: If limbs severed/destroyed, reanimates as two Mindless Zombies (cannot act). If killed, becomes six Mindless Zombies (cannot act).

actions: (1) Meaty Fists (Pugilism) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/5/6 damage. Mask Knockabout: Push target up to 5 yards. Crow Loose Pieces: Summon Mindless Zombie in base contact (cannot act), suffer 1 damage.

(1) Hurl Zombie (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: z10 | Resist: Df | Throw friendly Mindless Zombie at target. Target suffers 2/4/5 damage and Prone. Zombie suffers 2 damage, placed within 1 yard, becomes Prone.
system.notes: Massive brutes stitched from dozens of corpses. Graveyard's worth per creation. Severing limb releases Mindless Zombies. Inspire revulsion.
